description:
In Casebox (already open in Firefox at http://localhost/c/default), log in as admin (Username: root, Password: Admin1234!) and create a new folder named 'Enforced Disappearances - Central America 2024' inside the 'Active Investigations' folder in the left-side tree panel.

Steps:
1. Log in with the admin credentials if not already logged in
2. Navigate to or expand the 'Active Investigations' folder in the left tree panel
3. Right-click on 'Active Investigations' (or use the New/Create button) to create a new subfolder
4. Name the new folder exactly: 'Enforced Disappearances - Central America 2024'
5. Save/confirm the new folder creation

The new folder should appear as a child of 'Active Investigations' in the tree.
